name: deployment-engine
description: FortisPay Deployment Engine — equipment ordering, fulfillment, returns, inventory & forecasting on the POS Portal API

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:shared && npm run db:reset --workspace server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace web
